column2: # --- Panel 1: Food Desert Rate by Urban vs. Rural ---
aes(x = area_type, y = fd_rate, fill = area_type)) +
labs(title    = "The Urban Surprise: Cities Have Nearly 2x the Food Desert Rate",
subtitle = "Percentage of census tracts classified as food deserts",
caption  = "Source: USDA Food Access Research Atlas (2019)") +
aes(x = food_desert, y = pct_no_vehicle, fill = food_desert)) +
stat_summary(fun = mean, geom = "point", shape = 18, size = 4, color = "red") +
labs(title    = "The Car Equation: No Vehicle = 4x Higher Food Desert Risk",
subtitle = "Distribution of % housing units without a vehicle",
x = NULL, y = "% Housing Units Without a Vehicle",
caption  = "Source: USDA Food Access Research Atlas (2019)") +
title = "America's Food Deserts: An Urban Crisis Amplified by Vehicle Access",
